prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: tutorial onboarding UI component sheet for Matchatro/Orbwalker first-run guidance
Primary request: produce a 1536x1024 opaque chroma-key source sheet with separated tutorial components and strictly matte edges.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #FF00FF background only, exact single color, no variation.
Subject: large tutorial dialog frame, compact callout frame, control prompt frame, drag gesture icon, highlight ring marker, confirm action button frame, help badge, warning badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI, readable and instructional, dark stone and muted parchment interiors with gold/steel trim and cyan accents.
Composition/framing: clean organized sheet, consistent spacing, no overlap, no clipping.
Materials/textures: intentional interior surfaces only (stone, parchment, etched metal), never magenta placeholder fills.
Constraints: no text, no labels, no logos, no watermark, no checkerboard, no gradient background, no textured background, no glow bloom, no outer glow, no drop shadows touching background, no particles/smoke, hard clean edges, no #FF00FF inside any component.
Avoid: near-magenta tones inside assets; busy clutter; decorative effects extending into background.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
